pubmed_links: [Pfeiffenberger et al. (2020) Analysis of genes within the schizophrenia-linked 22q11.2 deletion identifies interaction of night owl/LZTR1 and NF1 in GABAergic sleep control](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/32339168/)
summary: C22orf39 lies within the 22q11.2 chromosomal deletion, the strongest single genetic risk factor for schizophrenia; nervous-system-specific knockdown of its Drosophila ortholog increases sleep duration, implicating it in the neurobehavioral phenotypes associated with 22q11.2 deletion syndrome. (emerging evidence)
